name: Ham & Hominy Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red or green bell pepper;
1/2 cup White or yellow hominy; 14 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the oil, potatoes, onion, bell peppers, ham, and celery.
2. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the hominy, chilies, flour, thyme, salt, and pepper.
4. Gradually stir in the milk.
5. Bring to a boil and reduce the heat.
6. Simmer, covered, for 30 to 40 minutes or until the soup is thickened and potatoes are tender.
